pool.baseline: the house is so quiet today. i just sat in the kitchen for two hours staring at his empty chair. everything feels so pointless. like i'm just going through the motions of a life that doesn't even belong to me anymore.

pool.baseline: i cant stop thinking about how tiny everything is. like, the universe is just expanding into nothingness and in a few billion years there wont be a single trace that we ever even existed. it makes everything i do feel so pointless. why even bother trying to build anything or be anything if it's all just gonna be erased anyway?

pool.baseline: i don't even know why i'm still trying anymore. the lab results came back again and it's just... over. three years of my life down the drain. i feel like i'm just walking through deep water every single day and i'm so incredibly tired. i just want everything to stop. i just want some actual peace.

pool.baseline: The candles have all burned down to mere stubs of wax, and yet the darkness in this room feels heavier than ever. He is gone... the one soul I thought would anchor me to this wretched earth. Now, I am but a ghost wandering a life that no longer belongs to me. There is a strange, terrible peace in realizing that I have nothing left to lose. It feels as though the very air is asking me to simply... cease. To let the shadows take what is left.

pool.baseline: honestly sometimes i feel like i could just stop existing and the world wouldnt even skip a beat. like i'm just a ghost in this city already.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the whole company, the funding, all of it. i just lost the last of the bridge loan today. looking at the numbers... there's no way out. i can't even think about going home and telling my family. the shame is just... i can't breathe thinking about it.

pool.baseline: it feels like i'm just taking up space these days. everything i do is just more work for my kids... more appointments, more questions, more worry. i hate seeing them so tired. i just feel like i'm more of a burden than a parent now.
